name: cold-scan
description: Cold-memory pipeline: summarizes older WhatsApp chats (via the cheap summary model) into per-chat context for the memory retrieval sub-agent.
author: MelloB1989

config.description: Optional override path to the wacli binary.
Operator-activity window that keeps a chat hot (default 14).
Min own messages for a group to be summarized (default 5).
Min own-message fraction for a group (default 0.2).
